overall.description: A first-person walk through a sunlit savanna landscape in a game engine, featuring rocky terrain, scattered acacia trees, and a winding dirt path. The camera moves steadily forward through a valley and open grassland with warm afternoon lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow rocky valley with steep slopes on both sides. The camera moves forward along a winding dirt trail through warm afternoon sunlight. A flock of birds flies across the sky, and scattered acacia trees dot the landscape ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open savanna approaching rocky hill formation

events.description: exits narrow valley into wider open savanna landscape
path curves to the right approaching the large acacia tree

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the terrain opens into wider grassland

entered.detail: large rocky hill formation with layered stone visible ahead on the path
tall acacia tree with thick trunk and spreading green canopy

segments.scene_description: The valley opens into a wide savanna as the camera approaches a large rocky hill formation ahead. The path curves slightly right toward a prominent acacia tree. The left rocky slope recedes into the background while the terrain becomes more open and grassy.

scene_state.functional_zone: open savanna grassland with scattered trees

events.description: passes close to the large acacia tree on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past the large tree and continuing through the open grassland

entered.detail: wide open savanna with dry grass and scattered vegetation extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the large acacia tree on the right and continues through expansive open savanna. The rocky formations fall behind, revealing a wide grassland dotted with scattered trees under the clear afternoon sky. The trail continues winding through the natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow rocky valley that gradually opens into an expansive, sunlit savanna. It begins by winding along a dirt trail between steep slopes under a warm afternoon sky, as a flock of birds flies overhead toward scattered acacia trees. As the camera moves forward, the valley walls recede and the terrain expands into a wide grassland, guiding the path toward a prominent rocky hill formation. The scene then shifts as the camera passes a large acacia tree on the right, leaving the rocky formations behind. Finally, the view opens completely across a vast savanna dotted with distant trees under a clear sky as the trail continues its winding journey.
